title: Export to PDF Only Export Current View?
excerpt: You’re kidding me right?  Exporting a workload chart only exports the view you can see.  It does not export the entire table?  How does one release this as a feature?

posts.author: seandotson (Sean Dotson)
posts.cookedHtml:
You’re kidding me right? Exporting a workload chart only exports the view you can see. It does not export the entire table? How does one release this as a feature?
